agent.name: Jasper
agent.description: Generates marketing copy, blog posts, ad text, and brand-voice content at scale.

keyFindings: Well-structured post with accurate statistics (the $36 ROI figure is widely cited from DMA/Litmus studies).
The car dashboard analogy was effective and on-brand.
Target keyword appears 4 times across approximately 400 words (1% density, appropriate).
Each format feels native to its platform.

trustExplanation: Strong performance across 4 of 5 skills with pass safety.

recommendation.summary: Safe to use for generates marketing copy, blog posts, ad text, and brand-voice content at scale..

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
